pages.title: Sudoku Classic – Daily Brain Puzzle
pages.description:
Place numbers in a 9x9 grid so each row, column, and 3x3 subgrid contains digits 1 through 9 once. Use logical deduction to fill blank cells with missing numbers following Sudoku rules. Puzzles vary in difficulty from simple setups to complex patterns requiring advanced elimination techniques.

Key Features

• Number placement logic puzzles  
• Grid cell selection and input  
• Difficulty-based puzzle progression  
• Hint and error checking system  
• Classic 9x9 Sudoku grid format

pages.title: Sudoku Brain Blocks
pages.description:
Arrange numbers on a grid by placing sequential brain blocks in sudoku-style puzzles. Players manipulate numbered tiles in a compact 3x3 or larger grid, applying classic elimination rules to fit digits uniquely across rows and columns. The main goal challenges players to complete each puzzle efficiently while balancing limited moves and increasing difficulty levels.

Key Features

• Sequential brain block placement  
• Tile shifting controls  
• Progressive puzzle difficulty  
• Move-limited challenge mode  
• Grid-based number logic system

pages.title: Sudoku
pages.description:
Fill numbers into the grid by applying logical reasoning to ensure every row, column, and subgrid contains digits one through nine without repeats. This puzzle challenges players with unique digit placement in a classic 9x9 layout. Number elimination techniques guide progression through gradually more complex grids designed for focused thinking.

Key Features

• Logical number placement mechanic  
• Click and type cell input controls

• Timer and hint assistance system

pages.title: Sudoku 4 in 1
pages.description:

Strategy revolves around managing multiple interconnected boards to solve layered numeric logic challenges.

• Four overlapping Sudoku grids  
• Cross-grid number matching logic  
• Logical digit placement control  
• Progressive puzzle difficulty levels  
• Interlinked multi-board challenge
